scripts.start-local: docker start redis || docker run --name redis -p 6379:6379 redis:alpine
scripts.insight: docker start redisinsight || docker run -d --name redisinsight --network app-prod_default -p 5540:5540 -e RI_REDIS_HOST=redis redis/redisinsight:latest
scripts.push: npm run build:back && npm run build:front && npm run push:back && npm run push:front
